actions.text: (-white)Research and place a [image]Archive Scanner facing a archive to scan it.
(-white)Research and place a [image]Archive Decoder next to a archive scanner to decode an archive. You will need to power it.

(-white)Repeat this process again for the other archives.
(-white)Enemies Incoming, Prepare to defend.
(-white)This is the enemy drop zone, blocks placed inside it will be detroyed upon the next wave start.
